name: Feature Request

---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem you are trying to solve, or the motivation behind this feature.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that may help.
